input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.5.6.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.5.6.2
            TITLE: all fuel vent lines must have a check valve to prevent fuel leakage when the tank is inverted.

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.5.6.2: All fuel vent lines must have a check valve to prevent fuel leakage when the tank is inverted.
IC.5.6.2 All fuel vent lines must have a check valve to prevent fuel leakage when the tank is inverted.

final_answer: All fuel vent lines must have a check valve to prevent fuel leakage when the tank is inverted.
